about_text: Currently a computer science student, I am passionate about the web, with a strong preference for Back-End development. While Front-End focuses on the visual aspects, I thrive in building the technical backbone and managing complex data flows. I enjoy solving algorithmic challenges, optimizing queries, and ensuring that every user interaction is supported by a solid server-side logic. To me, the true magic of an application lies in its invisible architecture: its ability to process information with speed and security. Beyond web development, I am passionate about gaming and listening to music. I have a soft spot for Metal, but I listen to absolutely everything, and I love chatting about what people are listening to so I can discover new things. In my spare time, I also do origami; most are relatively quick to make, but I have been known to spend several hours folding paper to reach my goal!
